en.text: adverb from a compound of G2095 and a derivative of τείνω (to stretch); in a well-strung manner, i.e. (figuratively) intensely (in a good sense, cogently; in a bad one, fiercely)

senses.gloss_en: adverb from a compound of G2095 and a derivative of τείνω (to stretch); in a well-strung manner, i.e. (figuratively) intensely (in a good sense, cogently; in a bad one, fiercely)
